title: Othlorian Sea
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Othlorian Sea''' was one of two major bodies of water on the planet of [[Fyodos]]. It separated the continents of [[Kalid]] and [[Othlor]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
